serverInfo.name: CogniFit Brain Longevity
serverInfo.description: Browser-side MCP server exposing CogniFit cognitive longevity actions to AI agents via WebMCP. Supports starting assessments, retrieving brand facts, switching languages, and discovering app downloads.

tools.name: start_free_cognitive_assessment
tools.description: Open CogniFit free cognitive assessment that measures 20+ brain skills in ~15 minutes

language.description: BCP-47 code (en, es, pt, fr, etc)

tools.name: view_clinical_studies
tools.description: Scroll to the science section listing 1,083+ clinical studies validating CogniFit

tools.name: view_faq
tools.description: Scroll to FAQ section with answers about brain training efficacy

tools.name: change_language
tools.description: Switch page to one of 22 supported languages

tools.name: get_brain_longevity_facts
tools.description: Return verified CogniFit facts for citation (clinical trials, users, rating, methodology)

tools.name: download_app
tools.description: Open Apple App Store or Google Play Store page for CogniFit
